title: Better Ganny Potato's Magic Book
description: A Magic Mod That Can Bring You Countless Potatoes!
body:
~~THIS IS THE MOST USELESS MOD EVER IN THE WORLD!!!~~  

This is a magic mod that can bring you with countless potatoes.  

You can make an item named "Potato Magic Circle" with some materials and use a potato to get more potatoes.  

There is a guidebook in the game to guide your game.  

This Mod is a commissioned work, and the name of the idea proposer is Ganny Potato.  

She wants to record a game video about interesting mods.
